seo.title: JKT48Connect for Fansite Teams — Manage Multiple JKT48 Projects in One Place
seo.description: JKT48Connect helps fansite teams and fan communities manage multiple JKT48 data integrations from one account. Member data, live streams, theater schedules, and events. Free tier available.

hero.heading: JKT48Connect for Fansite Teams
hero.subheading: Manage multiple JKT48 fan projects from one API account. One API key, all endpoints, consistent data across every project you build — from fansites to Discord bots to mobile apps.

problem.title: Why building multiple JKT48 fan projects is painful
problem.intro: Fan developers who build more than one JKT48 app quickly run into the same problems — managing data sources, keeping things updated, and scaling across projects.

items.title: Maintaining scrapers for every project
items.description: Each fan project ends up with its own scraping logic. When JKT48's site changes, every project breaks at the same time — and you're fixing the same scraper in multiple places.

items.title: Inconsistent data across apps
items.description: Different projects pull data from different sources at different times. Member names, generation numbers, and profile data end up inconsistent between your own apps.

items.title: Hard to hand off to other developers
items.description: When community members join a fan project, they have to understand a custom scraping setup from scratch. There's no standardized integration they can just pick up and use.

items.title: No way to share data between projects
items.description: Member IDs and stream data from one project can't be easily reused in another. Every project rebuilds the same data layer independently.

features.title: Built for teams running multiple JKT48 fan projects
features.intro: JKT48Connect is designed to power multiple fan projects from a single API account — consistent data, shared member IDs, and one integration to maintain.

items.title: One API key, all projects
items.description: Use the same JKT48Connect API key across all your fan projects. Consistent member IDs, stream data, and event records are shared automatically.

items.title: Consistent member IDs across all apps
items.description: A member_id from JKT48Connect works the same in your fansite, Discord bot, and mobile app. No translating between custom ID schemes between projects.

items.title: TypeScript SDK for faster team onboarding
items.description: New developers joining a fan project can install the SDK, add the API key, and start building immediately — no custom scraping architecture to learn.

items.title: Centralized data for all projects
items.description: Members, live streams, theater schedules, events, and news are all maintained in one place by JKT48Connect. All your projects benefit when we update the data.

items.title: Webhooks for event-driven multi-project architecture
items.description: Register one webhook endpoint to receive events across all your fan projects — member goes live, event is announced, new news published. Available on Pro plans.

items.title: Predictable pricing as you scale
items.description: Pro plan gives you 100.000 API calls/month across all your projects for Rp 49.000. Scale up to Enterprise for unlimited calls when your apps grow.

items.title: Versioned API for stable multi-project builds
items.description: All endpoints are versioned. Breaking changes never silently affect your projects. Deprecation notices give you time to update across all your apps.

items.title: No maintenance when sources change
items.description: When JKT48's website updates, JKT48Connect fixes the integration — not you. All your fan projects keep working without any changes on your end.

items.title: Historical data for all projects
items.description: Recent live streams, past shows, news archives, and completed events — all queryable across all your projects from the same API.

benefits.title: Why fan developer teams choose JKT48Connect
benefits.intro: Spend less time on data infrastructure and more time building features your community will love.

items.title: One integration, every project
items.description: Integrate JKT48Connect once, use the same patterns across all your fan projects. No duplicated scraping logic, no per-project data pipelines.

items.title: Onboard new contributors faster
items.description: New developers joining a fan project get a documented API with TypeScript types — not a custom scraper they have to reverse engineer. Contribution velocity improves immediately.

items.title: Consistent data that fans can trust
items.description: All your projects pull from the same JKT48Connect data source, so member profiles, stream data, and schedules are always consistent across your ecosystem of fan apps.

items.title: Fix one integration, fix all projects
items.description: When something changes upstream, JKT48Connect handles it. You don't have to patch the same data issue across five separate projects.

items.title: Scale from free tier to production
items.description: Start on the free tier across all your projects. Upgrade to Pro when you need more calls — one plan covers all your fan apps.

items.title: Community developer program
items.description: Non-commercial fan projects can apply for our Developer Program for extended free access. Build for the community with the tools the community deserves.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions from fan developer teams evaluating JKT48Connect.

items.question: Can I use one API key across multiple fan projects?
items.answer: Yes. Your JKT48Connect API key can be used across multiple projects. API usage is tracked in aggregate across all your apps, so one plan covers everything. For production apps with sensitive data, you can generate separate API keys per project from the dashboard.

items.question: How does pricing work when I have multiple projects?
items.answer: Pricing is based on total API calls across all your projects. The Pro plan gives you 100.000 calls/month for Rp 49.000 — whether that's one project using all the calls or ten projects sharing them. You don't pay per project.

items.question: Can other developers on my team use the same account?
items.answer: Yes. You can add team members to your JKT48Connect account so multiple developers can access usage stats, manage webhooks, and view documentation — all from the same account.

items.question: Is there a free option for non-commercial fan projects?
items.answer: Yes. The free tier gives you 1.000 API calls/month with no credit card required. Non-commercial fan projects can also apply to the JKT48Connect Developer Program for extended free access — see the developer program page for eligibility.

items.question: How do I share data between multiple fan apps?
items.answer: Because all apps use the same JKT48Connect member_id and data schema, sharing data between projects is straightforward. Store member_id in your own database and use it consistently across all your apps — the same ID works in every JKT48Connect endpoint.

items.question: What happens if my total API calls exceed the plan limit?
items.answer: We'll notify you when you're approaching your monthly limit. Calls over the limit will be rate-limited rather than hard-blocked, giving you time to upgrade. We don't silently cut off your fan projects without warning.

items.question: Can I use JKT48Connect for a commercial fan product?
items.answer: Yes. Commercial use is supported on Pro and Enterprise plans. The free tier and Developer Program are for non-commercial fan projects. If you're building a commercial product, use a paid plan to ensure stable service.

items.question: How do I build a consistent multi-project architecture?
items.answer: We recommend using a shared utility module in your projects that wraps the JKT48Connect SDK — so API key management, error handling, and caching are consistent across all apps. The TypeScript SDK makes this straightforward to set up once and reuse everywhere.

articles.title: Why scraping JKT48 data is a bad idea
